title: Live staged fetch validation proof
problem: Phase 3 staged mock spine is fixture-proven through orchestration and idempotency. Operators lack a gitignored DB proof that discover-sources and fetch-candidate can run against real OpenAlex/network inputs without public export or live LLM unless explicitly approved.
acceptance_criteria: Opt-in env-gated proof test documents real network discover/fetch on gitignored temp DB (skipped by default).
No public export or public site changes.
Default pytest collection remains mock-only without network.
non_goals: Live LLM extraction on staged sources.
rollback_plan: Remove opt-in live proof test; retain mock staged spine.
